remainingGaps.title: Booleans are descriptive
remainingGaps.description: Boolean parameters use descriptive adjective/noun names (enabled, dismissible, searchable, loading) rather than is/has-prefixed names.
issues: lib/src/modules/oi_activity_feed.dart:212 — internal _OiActivityFeedList constructor still uses `required this.hasMore` while the field at line 221 was renamed to `final bool moreAvailable`; this is an incomplete fix that produces a Dart compile error (field `hasMore` does not exist)
